title: rubus × sanguineus
intro: Rubus × sanguineus, also known as the Bloody Crane's-bill, is a hybrid of the Rubus and Geranium species, characterized by its distinctive red flowers and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus × sanguineus lie in its anthocyanin content, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with consuming Rubus × sanguineus include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced immune function, and antioxidant protection against cell damage. Rubus × sanguineus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried extract, with the tea being a popular way to harness its medicinal properties.
